title: selago zuluensis
intro: Selago zuluensis, also known as the Zulu selaginella, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and fighting infections. Selago zuluensis can be prepared as an infusion or a tincture for herbal use, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
